---
toc: false
---


## Autonomy


Autonomy is ...

## Chapters in this section

::: {.section-card-grid}

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 7: Importing Data

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 7](ch07-importing-data.html){.section-button}
:::

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 8: Indexing

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 8](ch08-indexing.html){.section-button}
:::

:::

## What to focus on

As you work through autonomy ...
